overall.description: A static cinematic shot from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the Night City skyline viewed across a calm body of water during golden hour. The scene features futuristic glass skyscrapers reflecting warm sunset light, with a prominent 'softsys' neon sign visible on a building to the right, and distant mountains framing the left side of the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city waterfront promenade overlooking downtown skyline

events.description: small flying vehicle or aircraft briefly traverses the sky from right to left in the distance

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint holding a fixed gaze across the water at the city skyline

entered.detail: reflective water occupying the lower half of the frame with golden sunset reflections
dark industrial building with illuminated green 'softsys' signage on the facade
tall futuristic towers with reflective glass surfaces catching the warm sunset light
hazy mountains silhouetted against the sky on the left horizon
scattered clouds illuminated with orange and pink hues from the setting sun

segments.scene_description: A completely static panoramic view of a futuristic cyberpunk city skyline across calm waters during golden hour. The glass skyscrapers reflect the warm sunset while a 'softsys' sign glows on a building to the right. The only movement in the minute-long shot is a brief appearance of a small flying vehicle crossing the sky around the 37-second mark.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, panoramic gaze across a futuristic city skyline that remains suspended in the warm glow of golden hour. It begins with a wide view of glass skyscrapers reflecting the sunset across a calm body of water, where a softsys neon sign glows prominently on the right. As the scene lingers in this stillness, the composition is briefly interrupted by a small flying vehicle gliding across the sky. The shot finally settles back into its tranquil state, framing the distant mountains and shimmering architecture against the fading light.
